name: Juletide Cranberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add the cranberries and nuts.
Combine the juice, rind, shortening, and boiling water in a separate bowl. Add the egg and blend into the cranberry mixture.
Pour the batter into a buttered loaf pan and bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
